title: Readability check + claim-to-source grounding self-check script
context: The project treats plain language as a measured gate, not an aspiration. Agents self-check descriptions with a readability tool and a claim-to-source grounding pass before human review. These tools need to be scripted, wired into pnpm test, and green in CI. They depend on schema-001 (for the content file structure) and guide-001 (for the reading-level targets).
objective: Build two CI scripts: (1) a readability-check script that parses each description file, computes the configured readability metric (Flesch-Kincaid-family for English; reviewer-attestation for languages without a metric), and fails CI if the threshold is not met and no attestation is present; (2) a claim-to-source grounding self-check script that parses each description's sourcedFacts references against the object.yaml and flags any description claim that has no corresponding sourceRef, emitting UNCERTAIN:grounding flags into review.yaml. Both are wired into pnpm test.
acceptanceCriteria: Readability-check script parses each description Markdown file, computes the configured metric for the language (Flesch-Kincaid-family for English), and fails with a clear error if the reading-level threshold is not met and no reviewer plain-language attestation is present in review.yaml

Claim-to-source grounding self-check script validates that every factual claim in a description has a corresponding sourceRef in the object.yaml, and emits UNCERTAIN:grounding flags into review.yaml for any ungrounded claim
Both scripts are wired into pnpm test so CI fails if any description fails readability or grounding checks
Scripts follow the agent-neutral core pattern: no vendor-specific logic; live in packages/ or a scripts/ directory consistent with the project structure
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; a changeset is added and commits are signed off (DCO)
resources: multilingual-museum-labels-schema-001 (content schemas — must be in place)
C:/code/elyos/CLAUDE.md (architecture rules: no vendor logic in core)
output: PR adding readability-check script and claim-to-source grounding self-check script, wired into pnpm test
